entries.text:
Verses 1-9

CHAPTER 31

The Fifth Woe Against Them that Go Down to Egypt

1. The Egyptian Alliance condemned again (Isaiah 31:1-3) 2. Jehovah promises to deliver Jerusalem (Isaiah 31:4-9) All looks forward towards the future. It is Jerusalem’s glorious future. The Lord will deliver it; He will preserve it (Isaiah 31:5).
